title: H&S Slow Feeder Dog Bowl - Dog Slow Feeder Bowl - Gradual Feeding Bowls For Dogs Cat Puppy - Anti Gulp - Prevent Food Overeating & Bloating - Small or Large
features: Promotes Healthier Eating: This dog slow feeder bowl helps pets eat at a natural pace, reducing risks of bloating, regurgitation, and obesity. Ideal slow feeder cat bowl or puppy slow feeder.
Durable & Safe Material: Made from food-grade ABS plastic, this slow feeder dog bowl puppy safe option is tough, non-toxic, and built to last—perfect for daily use as a dog food bowl slow feeder.

Non-Slip Base Design: The anti-skid bottom keeps the slow feeder dog bowl small and secure. No sliding or mess—great for both dogs and cats. Works well as a cat bowl slow feeder or anti gulp dog bowl.
Simple One-Piece Bowl: This slow eating dog bowl is easy to clean and use with no setup. A reliable slow feeder puppy bowl or slow feeder cat for everyday feeding without extra fuss.
Ideal Size & Weight: With a 20cm diameter and 5cm height, this 240g small dog slow feeder bowl fits perfectly for puppies and cats. A practical slow feed dog bowl for smaller pets of all types.
